title: Hello, World
body:
## Welcome

This is my corner of the internet. I'm Phil — a software engineer who enjoys building things for the web.

I built this site with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No frameworks, no build tools. Blog posts are stored as JSON files with Markdown content, rendered client-side.

### What you'll find here

- Notes on things I'm building
- Thoughts on software engineering
- The occasional side project writeup

```js
console.log('Hello, world!');
```

Thanks for stopping by.
